textByHashes.910dfcf75d72171f93d32f89491e014c31d3c9b6: As you can see, we are busy. What do you want?
textByHashes.af9ae9af7746fb3288975a27544de3c4105f8c00: This paper, as you call it, contains strategies for use in the war against the lizardmen. The details are a military secret, so do not ask any more questions.
